# Kinetic

> AI study companion for students: tutor, planner, focus timer, and flashcards.

Kinetic is a mobile-first study app that combines an AI tutor, smart planner, Pomodoro focus timer, and spaced-repetition flashcards in a focused editorial interface.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Landing page introducing the product and modules
- [Sign in](/login): Account creation and login
